scripts.dev:native: pnpm run rebuild:native && pnpm run build && electron .
scripts.build:bundle: pnpm --filter @hypershell/ui run build && pnpm run build && pnpm run sync:renderer
scripts.package:win:dir: pnpm run prepare:package && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --win nsis --dir --publish never
scripts.package:win:unsigned: pnpm run prepare:package && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --win nsis --x64 --publish never
scripts.package:mac:unsigned: pnpm run prepare:package && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac --x64 --publish never
